title: triblemma zeylanica
intro: Triblemma zeylanica, also known as Triblemma, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The medicinal properties of Triblemma zeylanica lie in its roots, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing health benefits such as pain relief, wound healing, and reduced inflammation. Triblemma zeylanica can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat different ailments and promote overall well-being.
